name: Classic Cantonese Cream of Peanut Pudding
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Cornstarch mixed with 2 cups Water
3 tbsp Half and half or whole milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Place peanut butter, water, sugar, and half and half in a 2 quart glass measure.
2. Cover with vented plastic wrap.
3. Stirring midway through cooking, microwave on high for 8 minutes or until mixture begins to boil.
4. Whisk until well combined.
5. Stir in cornstarch mixture and microwave on high for 8 minutes or until thickened.
6. Ladle into bowls and garnish servings with peanuts and mint leaves.
7. Makes 6 servings.
